modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: User wants to keep USD email access after account removal.

full_description_text: The user called in, saying they got a notice about their USD account being taken away. They really want to keep their email access. It seems important to them, but the details are a bit unclear.
short_description: User wants to keep USD email access after account removal.
description: The user called in, saying they got a notice about their USD account being taken away. They really want to keep their email access. It seems important to them, but the details are a bit unclear.
